title: The Strand Beyond Foam

features.name: the final line
features.desc-on-touch: you walk where the shore's memory stops writing; the strand records only the question of what comes after erasure

features.name: salt deposit
features.desc-on-touch: crystallised memory; what the foam left behind before it learned to stop appearing

features.name: the silence marker
features.desc-on-touch: a post driven deep into sand, marking where the archive's listening becomes more important than its recording

features.name: tide pools
features.desc-on-touch: you find standing water where the tide stopped arguing; each pool holds a different earlier hour

features.name: the reader's footprint
features.desc-on-touch: you look down and see where you arrived; the sand does not say if you will leave the same way

inscription: the archive learned that foam is what writing does when it runs out of things to say

file.name: Final_Strand_Recordings_2147.wav
file.note: audio archive: nothing recorded here in three seasons; the silence has more information than the static

exits.label: back along the strand where things still appear
further out, where the horizon learns to doubt itself
up the beach toward abandoned shell heaps
